title: Prevent XPath Injection Attacks
description: Avoid XPath injection vulnerabilities by sanitizing user input before using it in XPath queries.
recommendation: Sanitize user input before using it in XPath queries.
impact: Allows attackers to execute malicious commands in XML documents, potentially leading to data leaks, data deletion, and denial of service.

checks.message: Sanitize user input before using it in XPath queries.
